remaining_risks: Preexisting unstaged frontend edits and many untracked artifact-boundary files remain in the worktree.
Backend optional smoke timed out because the backend service was not running in this runtime.
A final release promotion should recheck state with an authenticated backend if the operator wants end-to-end smoke coverage.
recommendation: Release readiness is acceptable for a local validation pass, but treat the result as partial until the backend smoke can be run with the service up and the local worktree state is reconciled.
